name: Mexican Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Cook ground beef with onions and green peppers until browned.
3. Drain the excess fat from the cooked meat.
4. Combine the drained beef with tomato paste, sauce, water, and seasoning in a bowl. Stir until well mixed.
5. Simmer the mixture gently over low heat until it thickens and becomes bubbly.
6. Place a single layer of 3 tortillas in a 13 x 8 baking dish.
7. Pour half of the sauce evenly over the tortillas.
8. Sprinkle half of the black olives and both types of shredded cheese on top.
9. Repeat steps 6-8 with remaining ingredients.
10. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 25 to 35 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
